---
href: index.html
listing:
  id: chapitres-en
  contents:
  - theorie/*.qmd
  - pratique/*.qmd
  - ressources/*.qmd
  - glossaire/*.qmd
  - '!theorie/supports/*.qmd'
  - '!pratique/fiches/*.qmd'
  sort: order
  type: grid
  image-height: 300px
  grid-columns: 4
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

This site offers a range of theoretical and practical resources to help you learn about statistical data protection.

::: {#chapitres-en}
:::
